Notice Of Motion For Order Setting Aside And Vacating Void Default And Defualt Judgment And Granting Deft Leave To Defend
Off Calendar Apr-07-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT COSIMO SPERA'S MOTION FOR ORDER SETTING ASIDE AND VACATING VOID DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT AND GRANTING DEFENDANT LEAVE TO DEFEND.

APPEARANCES: Marc Libarle, Esq. 928-2400 for pltf & opposing party; Jeffrey A. Dito, Esq. of Valinoti & Dito LLp 986-1338 for deft & moving party.

Evidentiary hearing held.
Witness Lila Kazemi, sworn & examined, on behalf of defendant.
Cosimo Spera, sworn & examined, on his on behalf.
The following exhibits were marked for identification:
Plaintiff's exhibit #1 - printout of e-mail dated 10/2/09;
Plaintiff's exhibit #2 - letter dated 10/23/09;
Plaintiff's exhibit #3 - letter dated 10/28/09;
Plaintiff's exhibit #4 - letter dated 11/1;
Plaintiff's exhibit #5 - document with heading Juno message center dated 1/12/10.
Nate Freed, sworn & examined, on behalf of plaintiff.
The following exhibits were marked for identification:
Plaintiff's exhibit #6 - photo;
Plaintiff's exhibit #7 - Preferred Legal Services Inc.'s work order dated 11/16/09.

Argued and the Court denied the motion. Court ordered all exhibits returned to plaintiff's counsel on the record. No objections. Plaintiff to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Mar-30-2011 Discharged

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-17-2010 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-04-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Comm. William R. Gargano, Clerk: K. Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, #3689.

Marc L. Labarle, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Angelo Quaranta, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Cosimo Spera or Zipidy, Inc.
Defaults were entered against defendants on January 28, 2010.
Doe defendants were dismissed on April 20, 2010.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Angelo Quaranta, and the Defaulted Defendants Cosimo Spera and Zipidy, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $20,000.00.
Costs - $444.50, for a total judgment in the amount of $20,444.50.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar Apr-20-2010 Continued To May-04-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2010 Continued To May-28-10 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
